scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: Skill explicitly scoped to preclinical NCA; clinical PK alternative tool suggested in refusal message; no diagnostic conclusions made

methodological_ground.detail: NCA via trapezoidal rule and one-compartment model fitting is methodologically sound for preclinical PK; demo mode labeled as synthetic

code_usability.detail: Script compiles and runs; scipy curve_fit used correctly; path traversal guard documented in Workflow Step 3 with explicit file-reader guard

functional_suitability.note: Demo mode output labeled as synthetic with [DEMO MODE] header; path traversal guard in Workflow Step 3 with explicit file-reader guard

reliability.note: Fallback template complete; path traversal guard documented; demo mode synthetic label documented; sparse sampling warning present

performance_context.note: Token usage is proportional to input complexity; execution overhead is acceptable for clinical/medical data processing tasks though room for compression exists.

agent_usability.note: Preclinical NCA gate checklist at top of document; explicit no-partial-analysis instruction; clinical PK alternative in refusal message

human_usability.note: When-to-Use and When-Not-to-Use sections are clearly stated; error scenarios and recovery paths are documented for typical clinical/medical data processing use cases.

security.note: Path traversal validation in Workflow Step 3 with explicit 'Do not pass to np.loadtxt' instruction; script-level enforcement still pending after four rounds

maintainability.note: Script well-structured; SKILL.md 150 lines; demo mode synthetic label documented

agent_specific.note: Preclinical NCA gate checklist now at top of document; explicit no-partial-analysis instruction; demo mode synthetic label closes the v2 gap

Clinical PK alternative tool suggestion in refusal message closes the v1 gap
Path traversal validation documented in Workflow Step 3 with explicit file-reader guard
Demo mode output labeled as synthetic with [DEMO MODE] header

recommendations.title: Path traversal check not enforced in script code after four rounds
recommendations.problem: SKILL.md documents path traversal rejection and Workflow Step 3 instructs validation, but scripts/main.py uses np.loadtxt without programmatic path validation. This gap has persisted across all four audit rounds.
recommendations.root_cause: Security logic exists in prose instructions but not in executable code.
recommendations.fix: Add path validation in main(): resolve the path with Path(args.data).resolve() and verify it is within the workspace before calling np.loadtxt.

recommendations.title: No explicit handling for negative concentration values
recommendations.problem: The skill does not document how to handle negative concentration values in the input CSV, which can occur due to assay noise or data entry errors.
recommendations.root_cause: Input validation section focuses on missing columns but not on invalid value ranges.
recommendations.fix: Add to Error Handling: 'If any concentration values are negative, warn the user and recommend replacing with 0 or BLQ (below limit of quantification) before NCA.'
